title: The red cross book questions
wikitext:
[]: The red cross book questions             Quote Post by Zeruel » Wed Mar 10, 2010 10:55 pm Does anybody know where I can find the red cross book translated in English on pdf or word format? Also for the 7 individual dvds that came out for the platinum collection by adv the booklets inside the dvds were they the translated excerpts from the glossary portion of the red cross book?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Mar 10, 2010 11:16 pm http://evaotaku.com/html/programbooks.html# http://www.evamonkey.com/em_platinum_booklets.php

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Mar 10, 2010 11:44 pm See also Patrick Yip's translation: http://www.evamonkey.com/glossaries_rcb0.htm Also, it's not called "The Red Cross Book", it is actually the End of Evangelion Program Booklet.

Also for the 7 individual dvds that came out for the platinum collection by adv the booklets inside the dvds were they the translated excerpts from the glossary portion of the red cross book?
